description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal Victorian-era attire, featuring a tall top hat, a long overcoat with wide sleeves, and a high-collared shirt. The figure wears fitted trousers and boots, and holds a slender walking cane in one hand. His face is partially obscured by a monocle or eyepiece, and he has distinct facial hair, including sideburns and a mustache. The clothing appears textured and layered, with the coat extending to the knees and the shirt featuring decorative buttons. The overall appearance is that of a distinguished gentleman, possibly from the 19th century, with a dignified and upright bearing.
description: A Victorian-era adult male in formal attire with a top hat, long overcoat, and walking cane, exuding a dignified and classic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, top hat, monocle, facial hair, and cane held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the top hat, facial features, and the cane extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the long overcoat, the hat, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the cane in the left hand, the side profile of the face, and the coat's length.
attribute_clothing_type: formal Victorian overcoat, high-collared shirt, fitted trousers, top hat, and monocle
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, neatly styled hair with sideburns and mustache
